description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
A Zoox vehicle (Vehicle 1) operating in autonomous mode was eastbound on 17th Street, preparing to make an unprotected left turn onto 
Valencia Street in San Francisco. As the Zoox vehicle slowed approaching the intersection at Valencia Street, a left-turning vehicle in the 
oncoming lane accelerated abruptly. The Zoox vehicle braked in response to the oncoming vehicle, and was rear ended by a passenger car 
(Vehicle 2) traveling directly behind. The Zoox vehicle operator then disengaged from autonomy,  and shortly after, continued through the 
intersection along 17th Street and pulled over to exchange information. The Zoox vehicle sustained minor damage to the rear end, and 
Vehicle 2 appears to have sustained moderate damage to the left front area and hood. The Zoox vehicle operator and the software operator, 
seated in the front passenger seat, reported injuries after the collision. The police were not called.
Print
Clear Form
